title: Wicked Egyptian Cheese Sushi
description: A pungent, light brunch indulgence combining sweet gorgonzola with crisp cucumber and fragrant herbs, formed into sushi‑style nigiri for a raw‑friendly delight.

ingredients.name: cucumber
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced into thin rounds

instructions: Scoop 150g of gorgonzola-dolce into a shallow dish and let it soften at room temperature for 10 minutes.
Thinly slice the cucumber into 1‑mm thick rounds using a mandoline or sharp knife.
In a small bowl whisk together parsley, mint, lemon zest, olive oil, salt, pepper and rice vinegar to make a quick herb dressing.
Place a cucumber slice on a flat plate and spread a thin layer of the herb dressing over it.
Drop 30g of softened gorgonzola onto the cucumber and press lightly with a spoon to form a small mound.
Repeat the cucumber and cheese layering until you have used all the cheese and cucumber, creating about 8 sushi pieces.
Serve immediately, optionally garnishing with extra herbs or a drizzle of olive oil.
Enjoy the raw, creamy flavor that combines Egyptian herbs with French cheese for a quirky brunch treat.
